blockers.expected_action: Promote Seoul Open Data from metadata-only to bounded sample-call verification after service and index parameters are pinned.
Register a Seoul Open Data adapter with verification and call capabilities before runtime evidence can be generated.
Define a non-secret KEY injection path for source-scoped CI and local bounded checks.
Pin at least one service, start_index, end_index, and format sample for a bounded first batch.
Materialize a source-scoped Seoul Open Data registry or verification candidate list before collecting evidence.
Finish Seoul Open Data error taxonomy verification before treating provider RESULT codes as adapter defects.

required_cli_capabilities: Seoul Open Data bounded sample-call adapter
next_evidence_plan.first_batch_policy: Run a credential-gated bounded sample-call batch only after service/start_index/end_index/format parameters are pinned.
next_evidence_plan.promotion_gate: Do not promote Seoul Open Data datasets beyond registry_only until runtime evidence and service-specific row schema contracts exist.
